channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canal+ and Multichoice's Role in Enhancing South African Cinema and Storytelling
item.description: The recent partnership between Canal+ and Multichoice is set to reshape the cinematic landscape in South Africa, with a focus on authentic, high-quality local storytelling. Canal+'s acquisition of Sho...

item.title: Experts downplay ‘vibecession’ fears as Australians grow anxious about economy
item.description: As Australians face growing uncertainty, a recent poll reveals that over 60% believe the country is either already in recession or heading towards one. Consumer confidence has dropped, and inflation, ...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi set for Islamabad visit as Pakistan facilitates second US-Iran talks
item.description: Pakistani sources have confirmed that Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to arrive in Islamabad tonight with a small delegation. This visit marks the continuation of diplomatic effort...

item.title: Italian Company IPS Linked to Spyware Targeting Android Users
item.description: A new report has uncovered the activities of IPS, an Italian company specializing in surveillance technology, which has been linked to a new piece of spyware dubbed Morpheus. This spyware is distribut...

item.title: Australian farmers face another potential mouse plague as they prepare for seeding
item.description: Farmers across Western Australia and South Australia are grappling with the possibility of a new mouse plague, reminiscent of the devastating plagues of 2020 and 2021. These plagues can cause signific...

item.title: Man charged with murder after headteacher killed in Altrincham bike collision
item.description: A man has been charged with murder following the death of Michael Mullins, a 56-year-old headteacher at Stretford Grammar School in Manchester. Mr Mullins, who had led the school for 17 years, was cyc...

item.title: Mbowe calls for reconciliation in Hai as Sabaya expresses personal transformation
item.description: Former Chadema national chairman Freeman Mbowe has urged residents of Hai District to forgive former District Commissioner Lengai Ole Sabaya, saying that everyone makes mistakes and deserves a second ...

item.title: How Diaspora Funds Are Shaping Kenya's Real Estate Market
item.description: In the year ending June 2025, Kenyans living abroad sent home a record USD 5.08 billion, over KES 650 billion, surpassing earnings from tea, coffee, and tourism combined. Despite this, most diaspora f...

item.title: AFC and DBSA Partner to Boost Climate Resilience in Africa's Infrastructure
item.description: The Africa Finance Corporation (AFC) has partnered with the Development Bank of Southern Africa (DBSA) to launch a $750 million Infrastructure Climate Resilient Fund (ICRF) aimed at promoting climate ...

item.title: WWF-Pakistan raises environmental concerns over development at Margalla Hills foothills
item.description: WWF-Pakistan has raised alarms over ongoing and proposed development activities at the Margalla Hills foothills in Islamabad, warning of 'potentially irreversible risks' and serious ecological degrada...

item.title: Anissa Helou’s Lebanese Recipes: Barbecued Chicken Wings and More
item.description: In her latest cookbook *Lebanon* (2026), Anissa Helou revisits the flavours of her homeland, building on the foundation she laid with her 1994 cookbook *Lebanese Cuisine*. This new book celebrates Leb...

item.title: Mamata Banerjee's Ambitious Statement on 2026 Bengal Polls and Delhi
item.description: In a bold and controversial statement, West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee hinted at a larger political agenda in the upcoming 2026 state elections. Speaking at a rally, she suggested that afte...

item.title: Harry Newton: Running at 88, the London Marathon’s Senior Competitor
item.description: At 88 years old, Harry Newton, a retired grocer from Macclesfield, demonstrates that age is no barrier to running. Newton only began his running journey at 57, inspired by a charity opportunity linked...

item.title: Adelabu Says Tinubu No Endorse Anybody for Oyo 2027 Governorship
item.description: Former Minister of Power, Bayo Adelabu, wey dey run for Oyo State governorship under APC, don clear air say President Bola Tinubu no don back any candidate for 2027 election. Adelabu yarn this one whi...

item.title: The Trials of Winnie Mandela: A Deep Exploration of Her Struggles and Legacy
item.description: Netflix's new documentary series, 'The Trials of Winnie Mandela,' has sparked intense debate about South Africa's past and the enduring legacy of Winnie Mandela. Directed by Emmy-winning filmmaker Man...

item.title: Nigerian Military Begins Closed-Door Court Martial of 36 Officers Over Alleged Coup Plot in Abuja
item.description: Nigerian military don begin a high-profile court martial for 36 officers wey dem accuse say dem plan coup against President Bola Tinubu government. The trial start for Scorpion Officers’ Mess for Asok...

item.title: Accused in Delhi rape-murder case has violent history, officials considering psychological assessment
item.description: A 22-year-old civil servant’s daughter was brutally raped and murdered on April 22, 2026, in the Kailash Hills area of South Delhi. The accused, Rahul Meena, a former domestic help in the victim’s hou...

item.title: JAC T8 CTi Comfort Introduced in South Africa as Affordable Double Cab for Fleet Use
item.description: JAC Motors South Africa has introduced the T8 2.0L CTi Comfort 4x2 double-cab bakkie, priced at R349,900, making it the most affordable double cab in the country. Designed primarily for fleet operator...

item.title: Scarlett Moffatt Reflects on David Haye's Controversial Behaviour During I'm A Celebrity
item.description: Scarlett Moffatt, former contestant on I'm A Celebrity... South Africa, spoke to Good Morning Britain regarding the controversial actions of her fellow campmate David Haye. Scarlett, 35, who departed ...

item.title: Punjab to conduct 15-minute blackout mock drill to test emergency preparedness
item.description: A blackout mock drill is scheduled to take place in parts of Punjab on the night of April 24, 2026, as part of efforts to assess and strengthen emergency preparedness systems. The exercise, conducted ...
